response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and leadership in technical discovery sessions with enterprise stakeholders — key requirements for a staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Experienced with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Proven full-stack proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud-native deployment (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Demonstrated technical leadership through workshops, open-source contributions, and mentoring
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG, or LLM optimization in work history
Career gap since Oct 2025 raises questions about recent active technical engagement
Lacks documented experience leading technical discovery sessions with enterprise customers

key_factors.factor: Career gap and unclear AI production track record
